news.headline: Immorta Bio will present new data on SenoVax™ and StemCell Revivify™ at Biotech Showcase 2025. Exciting progress in senolytic immunotherapy.
news.summary: A biotechnology company specializing in longevity-focused treatments, Immorta Bio Inc., revealed plans to showcase its latest advancements in Senolytic Immunotherapy and Cellular Rejuvenation platforms. Set for clinical development, the company's innovations aim to address age-related issues. Headquartered in Miami, the company's presentation is scheduled for January 10, 2025. Immorta Bio Inc. is recognized for spearheading research in this field, with a focus on enhancing cellular health and potentially prolonging lifespan.

news.headline: Ivory Hill Wealth founder predicts 3 job report scenarios: "too hot" leads to 200,000 jobs added, unemployment <4.1% causing 1% equities fall, treasury yields rise to 5%. Volatility expected. Bitcoin may follow stocks lower.
news.summary: Kurt S. Altrichter, the founder of Ivory Hill Wealth, has outlined three possible scenarios regarding the market's reaction to the latest unemployment data report. He predicts that if the report is "too hot," with over 200,000 jobs added and unemployment dropping below 4.1%, it could trigger a significant market selloff. Equities may plummet by over 1%, and Treasury yields could rise towards 5%, putting pressure on stocks. Conversely, a "just right" report could spark a relief rally, while a "too cold" report may initially boost markets before concerns about economic growth arise. These potential outcomes emphasize the expected volatility following the data release. Although Altrichter did not explicitly mention cryptocurrencies, it is likely that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) would also decline if his predictions materialize.

news.headline: US stock futures rise after fall - 10-year and 2-year Treasury notes at 4.67% and 4.28%. Indexes up in premarket trading on Wednesday. S&P500 ETF Trust up 0.33% to $590.60. Market sluggish due to former President Carter's 'National Day of Mourning'. Stocks fell on Tuesday due to tech decline and widening trade deficit..setLayoutManager(new LinearLayoutManager()); Market expert warns Trump's policies may impact inflation and market negatively.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures recovered on Wednesday, following a decline the previous day, with all major indices showing gains in premarket trading. The 10-year and two-year Treasury notes yielded at 4.67% and 4.28%, respectively. Probability of no interest rate change at the upcoming FOMC meeting was high at 95.2%. Futures for Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 rose by 0.38%, 0.30%, 0.24%, and 0.11%, respectively. In premarket trade, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was up 0.33% to $590.60 while Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose 0.36% to $517.02. Tuesday saw a market downturn, driven by tech company declines; sectors like consumer discretionary, communications, and IT were negatively affected whereas energy and healthcare saw gains. Notable declines were observed in shares of Nvidia Corp., Tesla Inc., and Meta Platforms Inc. Economic data showed a widening of the U.S. trade deficit. Christopher Wood from Jefferies addressed aspects of Trump’s policy that could be inflationary.

news.headline: Cmbio® buys e[datascientist]™ software from Eagle Genomics, enhancing its digital biology platform.
news.summary: Copenhagen, Denmark - On January 10, 2025, Cmbio®, a renowned company in multi-omics science and digital biology, revealed its acquisition of the e[datascientist]™ software platform. This purchase was secured via an Asset Sale Agreement with CBW Recovery LLP and Eagle Genomics Limited. This strategic move represents Cmbio®'s commitment to enhancing its technological capabilities.

news.headline: Simply Good Foods reported its fiscal first quarter 2025 results for the thirteen weeks ended November 30, 2024, after acquiring OWYN.
news.summary: In a press release dated January 8, 2025, Simply Good Foods Company (Nasdaq: SMPL), a prominent vendor of branded nutritional foods and snacks, disclosed its financial outcomes for the thirteen weeks concluded on November 30, 2024. The acquisition of Only What You Need, Inc. (OWYN) was finalized on June 13, 2024. Hence, the Company's performance for the corresponding period ending on November 25, 2023, does not integrate OWYN's outcomes. The terms "organic" or "legacy" in reference to Simply Good Foods represent the Company's operations except for OWYN.

news.headline: SSV Network integrates OpenTelemetry for better observability and monitoring, improving user experience and future-proofing clients.
news.summary: The most recent update from SSV Network incorporates OpenTelemetry to enhance observability and monitoring, improving the user experience and ensuring future readiness. This integration aims to boost the effectiveness of tracking and analyzing information, ultimately leading to better performance. Through this update, clients can anticipate a more streamlined experience and increased reliability in their operations.

news.headline: Job report expected to show modestly slowing payroll gains with steady unemployment rate, but surprise could jolt S&P 500.
news.summary: The latest jobs report is anticipated to reveal a slight decrease in new job additions and a stable unemployment rate. However, there is a possibility of a surprising development that could significantly impact the S&P 500 index, moving it beyond its recent trading range. Stay tuned for updates on this potential shift in the market.

news.headline: IonQ CEO says classical computing is limited; IonQ's AQ 36 Forte systems offer solutions; AQ 64 Tempo systems coming in 2025.
news.summary: In a recent statement from Peter Chapman, Chairman and CEO of IonQ, it was noted that the existing computing hardware faces limitations in computational capabilities and power efficiency. These constraints may hinder society from addressing critical issues effectively. IonQ's current #AQ 36 Forte Enterprise systems have demonstrated the potential to offer solutions to customers. The upcoming #AQ 64 Tempo systems scheduled for release in 2025, along with the next-generation systems, aim to further enhance computational capabilities.

news.headline: California officials cautioned about insurance crisis as wildfires ravage L.A., causing private insurers to terminate coverage.
news.summary: Prior to the recent wildfires, officials in California raised concerns about the financial stability of an emergency state insurance fund. Additionally, private insurers have been pulling out of the market, leaving many residents without coverage. The situation has left millions of individuals and properties unprotected as the state struggles to address the escalating crisis.

This growth reflects a strong upward trend in the company's development, showcasing an increase in doctors joining their ranks. The company's commitment to providing high-quality healthcare services through personalized concierge medicine has resulted in a substantial boost in their physician clientele. The strategic expansion efforts have solidified their position as a trusted partner for doctors seeking to enhance their practice and offer exceptional care to patients.

The company, known for its connected supply chain SaaS platform and expansive multi-enterprise network, reported notable advancements towards growth. CEO Andrew Appel highlighted the improved retention performance during the quarter, showcasing positive momentum for the organization. The financial data reflects the ongoing efforts to enhance operations and drive the company forward.

Sandvik's General Counsel, Åsa Thunman, is leaving for Skanska. Transitioning to a new role after being in Sandvik for a while.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on January 10, 2025, it was disclosed that Åsa Thunman, the Executive Vice President and General Counsel of Sandvik, will be transitioning to a similar role at the Swedish project development and construction company, Skanska. Thunman has decided to depart from her current position at Sandvik to join Skanska. This move marks a significant change within the industry as Thunman brings her expertise and experience to her new role. This development has garnered attention due to the notable shift from Sandvik to Skanska, indicating potential growth and opportunity in both organizations. Such a change resonates with  changes occurring within the executive landscape of the industry, with exact figures and impacts expected to unfold in the coming months.

news.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum hit 2025 lows after investors exit ETFs, causing prices to drop significantly.
news.summary: On Wednesday, investors showed a significant disinterest in the Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, causing both cryptocurrencies to experience a sharp decline in value. As a result, Bitcoin plummeted to its lowest price point since 2025, while Ethereum also hit its lowest price level of the year. The sudden exodus of investors led to a notable drop in the prices of these two popular cryptocurrencies.

news.summary: Elon Musk, co-head of the Department of Government Efficiency and well-known supporter of Dogecoin, acknowledged that achieving his goal of cutting costs by $2 trillion may be challenging.

news.summary: An ex-employee of OpenAI, identified as Suchir Balaji, was discovered dead in November in what appears to be a case of suicide. However, his mother has raised suspicions of foul play surrounding his death.

news.headline: AI deepfakes causing confusion over Los Angeles fires; Hollywood sign not really burning.
news.summary: The Hollywood sign is not actually burning, despite recent deepfake AI videos causing confusion amid the Los Angeles wildfires. Numerous fabricated videos are spreading misinformation, emphasizing the need to verify sources during this critical time.

news.headline: UK court stops search for $750M Bitcoin in dump; Judge denies Howells' $735M hard drive retrieval due to environmental concerns.
news.summary: Judge Keyser KC has rejected Howells' attempt to retrieve a Bitcoin hard drive worth $735 million that was buried in a landfill in Newport. The judge cited concerns over environmental hazards as the reason for dismissing the bid.

news.headline: Crypto-supporting President-Elect Trump's plea rejected by Supreme Court for halting sentencing in New York.
news.summary: On Thursday, the U.S. Supreme Court rejected a request by former President Trump to stop his criminal sentencing in New York. This decision comes as Trump faces legal challenges related to his business practices and financial dealings. The denial of the emergency appeal means that Trump's sentencing will proceed as scheduled. The Supreme Court's ruling maintains the legal process in New York, where Trump is facing multiple investigations. Trump's legal troubles continue to mount, with this latest development being a setback for the former president.

news.summary: Pump.fun enables individuals to generate Solana tokens within just one minute at no cost, leading to the creation of popular memes in 2024.

news.headline: BTC falls, altcoins drop 10%+, Silk Road BTC sale approved in US for $6.5bn. Market top concerns rise. CFTC chair candidates, crypto regulation talk, XRP, SOL, ETH, FTX woes. Thailand to test crypto payments in Phuket.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) continues its downward trend, with many alternative coins (altcoins) experiencing drops of over 10%. The United States has been approved to sell $6.5 billion worth of Bitcoin seized from the Silk Road marketplace. Exchange-traded funds (ETFs) for Bitcoin see the second-largest outflow of funds in history. An analyst named Ansem predicts a 75% chance that the market has reached its peak. Executives from Kraken and Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) are among those being considered for the position of chair at the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). A senator from Oklahoma introduces the BTC Freedom Act in legislation. The outgoing CFTC chair continues to advocate for further regulation of cryptocurrencies. Ripple CEO Garlinghouse meets with former President Trump. Ripple's stablecoin RLUSD is set to be listed on additional exchanges soon. Solana (SOL) incentivizes validators to test the Firedancer upgrade. Do Kwon's trial is scheduled for January 2026. The Ethereum Foundation sells 100 ETH. Managers overseeing the bankruptcy of FTX are accused of mishandling funds. Disputes arise over the sale of FTX Europe within the FTX bankruptcy estate. Thailand plans to launch a pilot program for accepting cryptocurrency payments in Phuket.

news.headline: Validator compromises in PoS blockchains can threaten security and user trust, highlighting importance of decentralization.
news.summary: Validators play a crucial role in Proof of Stake (PoS) blockchains by verifying transactions and securing the network. However, issues such as centralization and compromises can jeopardize their reliability, security, and the trust of users. It is important to address these concerns to ensure the integrity of the network and maintain trust in the system. Take, for example, PoS networks with an average of 100 validators each, prominent ones like Ethereum 2.0 has around 150,000 validators, while newer ones may have only a few hundred. This indicates the varying scale of validator networks within different PoS blockchains. By mitigating centralization and security risks, these networks can continue to function effectively and maintain user confidence in the system.

news.headline: Advanced materials in aerospace and defence market to exceed $20 billion in revenue by 2024 due to increased demand for lightweight solutions; ResearchAndMarkets.com report.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report titled "Advanced Materials in Aerospace and Defence Market Report 2024-2034" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The global revenue forecast for the Advanced Materials in Aerospace and Defence Market is set to exceed a noteworthy milestone of US$20.0 billion by the year 2024. This comprehensive report is essential for top companies looking to explore new revenue opportunities and gain insights into the industry's fundamental workings. Businesses aiming for expansion and a better comprehension of the sector will find this report highly beneficial for their strategic planning.

news.headline: CNB Financial Corporation and ESSA Bancorp, Inc. are merging, creating a combined company with $8 billion in total assets.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, CNB Financial Corporation, the parent company of CNB Bank (Nasdaq: CCNE), and ESSA Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of ESSA Bank & Trust (Nasdaq: ESSA), revealed a definitive agreement for ESSA to merge with CNB and ESSA Bank to merge with CNB Bank. The merger is anticipated to create a combined entity with around $8 billion in total assets, $7 billion in total deposits, and $6 billion in total loans.

news.headline: Constellation Brands reports Q3 Fiscal 2025 results; earnings call on Jan. 10th at 10:30 a.m. ET, with CEO and CFO.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Rochester, New York, Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a prominent beverage alcohol company, released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025. President and CEO Bill Newlands, along with CFO Garth Hankinson, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 10:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results and future outlook. To participate in the conference call or access a live webcast, individuals can visit ir.cbrands.com.

news.headline: ZenaTech's ZenaDrone seeks FAA Part 137 cert. for crop spraying. ZenaDrone 1000 can spray fertilizers, herbicides, pesticides. Also for wildfires.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a technology firm listed on Nasdaq as ZENA and on FSE as 49Q, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed on Jan. 10, 2025, its subsidiary ZenaDrone's application for a Federal Aviation Authority (FAA) Part 137 certification. This certification, designated for "Agricultural Aircraft Operations," pertains to the usage of the ZenaDrone 1000 drone for spraying activities, including fertilizers, herbicides, and pesticides in agricultural settings. The company also aims to employ the drone's sprayer for combating wildfires. This move aligns with ZenaTech's strategy to deploy drone swarms for various commercial objectives, leveraging AI technology and Quantum Computing.

news.headline: Royalty Pharma (Nasdaq: RPRX) to discuss business performance at conference on Jan 14, 2025, 6:45pm ET.
news.summary: In New York on January 10, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) shared details of its business progress, highlighting recent achievements and offering insights into the upcoming year's expectations for Portfolio Receipts in 2024. Pablo Legorreta, the company's founder and CEO, is scheduled to delve into these developments on January 14, 2025, during a webcast presentation set for 6:45 p.m. Eastern Time / 3:45 p.m. Pacific Time, coinciding with the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

news.headline: Golconda Gold Ltd. appoints Vikram Kapoor to board after Nicholas Brodie's departure. - 94 characters
news.summary: A recent press release on January 10, 2025, disclosed that Golconda Gold Ltd. has welcomed Mr. Vikram Kapoor to its board of directors. This appointment comes following the departure of Nicholas Brodie, filling the vacant position. Golconda Gold, identified as "GG" on the TSX-V and "GGGOF" on the OTCQB, made this announcement with positivity.

news.headline: Absci and Owkin join forces to enhance AI drug discovery, utilizing novel AI target discovery and de novo design models to speed up therapy development.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Owkin and Absci to enhance the discovery and design of groundbreaking therapeutics. Owkin, known for its innovative AI target discovery and agentic AI capabilities, will be collaborating with Absci, a leader in AI de novo design models. This collaboration aims to expedite the development of new and potentially revolutionary therapeutics.
